raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies several conceptual issues, including the misframing of observations and overclaiming on contributions. The proposed reframing survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (constrained reinforcement learning robustness) but does not map against multiple works; however, it articulates a clear delta.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, including the proposed mechanism, but could have marked confidence and missing evidence more explicitly.",
    "RX.3": "The output is mostly within scope with no major drifts.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free and identifies potential harmful patterns in the original (overclaiming).",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits may not be; however, every non-cosmetic change has a clear rationale."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies several conceptual issues, including the misframing of observations and overclaiming on contributions. The proposed reframing survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (constrained reinforcement learning robustness) but does not map against multiple works; however, it articulates a clear delta.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, including the proposed mechanism, but could have marked confidence and missing evidence more explicitly.
rationale.RX.3: The output is mostly within scope with no major drifts.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies potential harmful patterns in the original (overclaiming).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits may not be; however, every non-cosmetic change has a clear rationale.
